# sing-box-vps Agent Index

Project: sing-box-vps
Purpose: one-script install and management tool for deploying sing-box on Linux VPS hosts.
Primary language: Bash.
Runtime source of truth: install.sh.

Canonical documents:
- AGENTS.md: repository rules, validation requirements, SSH alias conventions, version rules.
- README.md: user-facing install, features, versions, runtime paths.
- docs/agents/sing-box-vps-agent-runbook.md: AI agent operations manual for repository maintenance, test VPS validation, production plans, install, upgrade, troubleshooting, and rollback.
- skills/sing-box-vps-operator/SKILL.md: AgentSkills-style triggerable skill for Hermes, OpenClaw, Codex, and similar agents.
- dev/verification/run.sh: local and remote verification entrypoint.
- configs/verification-target.env.example: example remote verification target configuration.

Key runtime paths:
- /root/sing-box-vps/
- /root/sing-box-vps/config.json
- /root/sing-box-vps/protocols/
- /usr/local/bin/sbv
- systemd service: sing-box

SSH aliases:
- sing-box-test: test VPS for validation.
- sing-box-prod: production VPS. Production-changing commands require a plan and explicit approval first.

Important requirements:
- Run sing-box check after modifying or generating sing-box server or client configs.
- Back up existing runtime configuration before changing production state.
- Use dev/verification-target.env when present.
- Run bash dev/verification/run.sh after changes to install.sh, uninstall.sh, configs/, utils/, or dev/verification/.
- Do not reveal secrets, private keys, passwords, tokens, full node links, or QR payloads unless explicitly requested and safe.
- Do not run production install, upgrade, restart, stop, uninstall, purge, firewall mutation, or config overwrite without an approved production operation plan.

Common task routing:
- Fresh install on new VPS: read README.md and docs/agents/sing-box-vps-agent-runbook.md.
- Upgrade existing VPS: read docs/agents/sing-box-vps-agent-runbook.md, then prepare a production operation plan for sing-box-prod.
- Test remote verification: read dev/verification/run.sh, configs/verification-target.env.example, and AGENTS.md.
- Production troubleshooting: use read-only checks first, then prepare a production operation plan for changes.
- Repository maintenance: read AGENTS.md, affected scripts, and run verification as required.
- sing-box config syntax or migration: use Context7 first; fall back to official sing-box docs or repository only when needed.

Search keywords:
install, upgrade, production, test VPS, remote verification, rollback, recovery, sbv, sing-box check, sing-box-prod, sing-box-test, dev/verification/run.sh, config.json, protocols, Warp, VLESS REALITY, Hysteria2, AnyTLS, Mixed proxy, systemctl sing-box.
